understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move any pushable object, such as the selected piece or a block, to or beyond the specified target x-coordinate within the given step budget, prioritizing efficiency to avoid wasting actions.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one step (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects if they are in the way; walls can block movements or pushes, with some boundaries behaving differently for direct movement versus pushing, requiring observation to understand their exact rules.
